caption_probe_region.label: Figure 2
caption_probe_region.reason: A grid of ICA component brain topography maps.

analysis.markdown: The figure displays a grid of 19 topographic maps representing Independent Component Analysis (ICA) components, labeled ICA000 through ICA018. Each map shows the spatial distribution of electrical activity on a scalp, with color gradients representing intensity (red for positive, blue for negative) and contour lines indicating potential levels. The maps are arranged in a 5x4 grid (with the last row containing 4 items).
